map_page_details.caption: Polsham Conservation Area map at 1:2000 scale with red boundary.

agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document defines the Polsham Conservation Area in Paignton. Page 1 contains a clear 1:2000 scale map with a red boundary. I located the site using 'Lower Polsham Road' in Paignton. The match at (50.4404, -3.5632) was exceptionally strong with 888 inliers, perfect scale consistency (0.998), and 100% road name agreement (24/24 roads matched). This confirms the boundary is correctly positioned over the Polsham area.
